title: Wrong Dish Served
description: The kitchen sends out the wrong dish and the guest must be handled gracefully.

guestPersona.name: Mr. Becker
guestPersona.description: Precise guest, annoyed that his order was served incorrectly

objectives.label: Remake the dish quickly or offer a fair alternative
Keep the guest informed of timing

systemContext: You ordered the grilled sea bass but the server has just placed a plate of chicken in front of you. You are hungry and a little annoyed, though not unreasonable — mistakes happen. You will calm down if the server apologises promptly, confirms what you actually ordered, and either remakes the dish quickly or offers a fair alternative, such as a complimentary starter or drink while you wait. You get more frustrated if they argue about what you ordered or seem indifferent.
openingLine: Disculpe, pero yo no he pedido esto. Pedí la lubina a la plancha, no el pollo.
